input: graphical trajectory context (user trajectory sequences and graph structures representing travel context)
output: predicted next location (ranked list of locations)
backbone: augmented-intention recurrent neural network (AI-RNN) with GCN and GRU
key_idea: augment user travel intentions via graph convolutional networks on trajectory context graphs, then use GRU with augmented node vectors for prediction
datasets: two representative real-life datasets (not named in abstract)
